sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33714" key="e(likwto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑλῐκ-ωτός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n33714.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">threaded like a screw</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:49:20:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">49.20.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
